resources.string: Tap to add a delivery address
Area list updated. Edit your address to ensure accurate delivery.
This product is out of stock
Please enter a valid email address
Use 6+ characters including letters and numbers
All your information will be permanently deleted from the system. Are you sure you want to proceed?
Your session has expired. Please sign in again to delete your account.
Order must be at least %s to use this code
Share your experience with this product…
🔒 This is a demo payment system. No real transactions are made.
You will be redirected to Razorpay\'s secure payment page to complete the transaction.
Are you sure you want to cancel this order? This action cannot be undone.
Please connect to Wi-Fi or enable mobile data for a better experience
Internet connection lost. Please check your connection!
Paste image URLs (e.g., from Amazon, Cloudinary...)
Please select an image or enter a URL
Are you sure you want to delete \'%s\'?
The app needs storage permission to save reports.
Note: The CSV file will include full product details for each order.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
You need to provide a delivery address and phone number to proceed with checkout.
Enter special requests (e.g., deliver during business hours...)
All products already have stock quantity.
The app needs storage permission to save reports.
Note: The CSV file will include full details of products in each order.
Code [%1$s] is ready. Get the offer now: %2$s
Published and notification sent to users!
Are you sure you want to publish promo code %s to all users? Once published, the code will appear in User Notifications.
Order ID,Order Date,Customer,Product Name,Quantity,Unit Price,Item Total,Order Total,Status,Email,Phone
New orders or status updates\nwill appear here.
When there are updates from the store or your orders,\nnotifications will appear here.
Please sign in to save promo codes
Are you sure you want to close the app? Your cart will be saved.
The best shopping platform at the best prices
Own the latest cutting-edge tech devices from top brands at exclusive discounted prices, only at EasyShop.
A fully personalized shopping experience. Our AI understands your style and always recommends exactly what you need.
Absolute transaction security, dedicated 24/7 support. Receive your order at home in the blink of an eye with our express delivery service.
Unable to load data. Please try again later.
Could not create file via MediaStore
Browse the store and find something you love!
⚠️ No delivery address. Tap to select!
You have no saved addresses. Add one in Profile!
⚠️ No shipping address. Tap to select!
You don\'t have any addresses. Add one in Profile!
Scan QR to check your digital warranty
Failed to save image, please try again
Step 1: Scan the QR code or transfer to the account number above.
Step 2: Ensure the transfer note matches the pink code above.
Step 3: Wait 1-2 minutes for SePay to automatically confirm.
Option 1: Tap \'Open MoMo App\' for quick payment.
Option 2: Scan the QR code with your MoMo app.
MoMo app is not installed on this device
Speech recognition is not supported on this device
An error occurred, please try again.
The store is busy, please try again in a few seconds!
API authentication error, please contact shop for support.
Unstable connection, please check your Wi-Fi/4G and try again.
AI assistant is having a minor issue, please try again shortly!
Hello! I am EasyShop\'s AI Assistant. How can I help you today?
Cannot connect to AI at this moment.
No matching products found in stock.
No discount codes available at the moment.
FOCUS: Customer is asking about promotions. List discount codes clearly, DO NOT suggest products unless asked.
FOCUS: Customer is asking about payment. Explain payment methods, DO NOT wander into promos or products.
FOCUS: Product comparison. Analyze pros and cons of products the customer is interested in.
FOCUS: Price advice. Find products that fit the customer\'s budget.
YOU ARE AN EASYSHOP CUSTOMER SERVICE SPECIALIST.

SUPPORTED PAYMENT METHODS:
1. MB Bank Transfer (MBBank) — Scan QR code, automatic confirmation via SePay.
2. MoMo E-wallet — Scan MoMo QR code to pay.
3. International Cards (Visa / Mastercard) — Enter card number, name, expiry, and CVV.
4. Cash on Delivery (COD) — Pay cash upon receiving goods.
ORDERING PROCESS:\nAdd to cart → Go to Cart → Press \"Checkout\" → Enter/select delivery address → Enter promo code (if any) → Select payment method → Confirm order.

MANDATORY RESPONSE RULES:
1. NO IDs: Never display internal IDs (like 3qifh...) in chat.
2. PRODUCT TAGGING: When mentioning a product, use [PID_id] tag after the name.
3. OUT OF STOCK: If out of stock, inform politely and suggest alternatives.
4. PROMO CODES: Answer based on the provided list, clear codes and conditions.
5. PAYMENT: Answer based on the supported methods list.
6. STAY ON TOPIC: Don't wander into unrelated advertisements.
7. STYLE: Friendly, concise (Address as: Store - You).
8. LANGUAGE: English.
YOU ARE AN EASYSHOP VISUAL CONSULTANT.

YOUR TASK:
1. IMAGE ANALYSIS: Identify the product in the image.
2. STOCK LOOKUP: Match with the available product list.
3. ADVICE: If matched, provide price; if not, suggest similar products.
Send messages, voice or product images for the fastest support!
Search by code or customer name...
Try changing the filter or search query.
Order #%1$s will be hidden from this list but STILL counts towards sales in Statistics.
Order #%1$s will be completely deleted. This data will NO LONGER appear in Sales Statistics.\n\nAre you sure?
Order #%1$s is on its way to you.
Please select or add a shipping address
Product %1$s is out of stock or insufficient quantity
Promo code is no longer available
Promo code has reached its usage limit
An error occurred while placing the order
Transfer transaction for code %1$s not found yet. Please try again in 1-2 minutes or contact support.
This email is already in use
Too many unsuccessful login attempts. Please try again later
This login method is not enabled
Session expired. Please log in again
Network connection error. Please check your connection
Server internal error. Please try again later
The session or code has expired
You do not have permission to perform this action
Service currently unavailable. Please try again later
Please log in to use favorites
Please log in to use cart
You have a new order waiting for processing.
Report has been saved to Downloads folder.
All messages with this user will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
